name: simple_greedy
description: Single-pass greedy: iterate models once, place in best GPU

name: sorted_greedy_size
description: Sort models by size descending, then greedy placement

name: sorted_greedy_kvpr
description: Sort by req_rate/slo ratio, then greedy KVPR-minimizing placement

name: best_fit_decreasing
description: Classic BFD: sort by size, place in GPU with least remaining space that fits

name: worst_fit_decreasing
description: Sort by size, place in GPU with most remaining space

name: first_fit_decreasing
description: Sort by size, place in first GPU that fits

name: min_kvpr_greedy
description: Always place in GPU that minimizes current max KVPR

name: balanced_load
description: Balance weighted request rate across GPUs equally

name: memory_balanced
description: Balance memory usage across GPUs before considering KVPR

name: two_phase_size_kvpr
description: Phase 1: bin-pack by size. Phase 2: optimize KVPR via swaps

name: pairwise_swap
description: Start with greedy, then pairwise swap models to improve KVPR

name: local_search_hill_climb
description: Hill climbing: repeatedly move models to better GPUs until no improvement

name: iterative_refinement
description: Multiple passes: each pass tries to improve worst GPU's KVPR

name: binary_search_threshold
description: Binary search for optimal KVPR threshold, check feasibility

name: binary_search_capacity
description: Binary search on capacity allocation, then greedy fill

name: priority_queue_kvpr
description: Use heap to always place in GPU with lowest current KVPR

name: round_robin_enhanced
description: Round-robin base with memory constraint checking

name: ratio_binning
description: Group models by req_rate/slo ratio into bins, distribute bins to GPUs

name: size_class_partition
description: Partition models into size classes, balance classes across GPUs

name: greedy_lookahead_1
description: Greedy with 1-step lookahead: consider next model when placing

name: greedy_lookahead_2
description: Greedy with 2-step lookahead: consider next 2 models

name: exhaustive_small
description: Try all permutations for small inputs, greedy fallback for large

name: branch_bound_lite
description: Branch and bound with simple pruning on KVPR lower bound

name: backtrack_feasible
description: Backtracking search for feasible placements, return first good one

name: dp_subset_gpu
description: DP over model subsets per GPU, combine optimal sub-solutions

name: simulated_annealing_step
description: SA-style: accept worse moves with decreasing probability

name: tabu_swap
description: Tabu search: swap models but avoid recently swapped pairs

name: multi_start_greedy
description: Run greedy from multiple random orderings, keep best

name: random_restart
description: Random placements with restarts, keep best valid solution

name: genetic_crossover
description: Evolutionary: crossover placements, mutate, select fittest

name: cluster_then_assign
description: Cluster similar models together, assign clusters to GPUs

name: constraint_propagation
description: Propagate memory constraints to prune invalid placements early

name: dual_sort_interleave
description: Sort by size and by ratio, interleave from both orderings

name: variance_minimizer
description: Minimize variance of KVPR across GPUs, not just max

name: threshold_filter_assign
description: Filter models above KVPR threshold, assign filtered first

name: score_guided_search
description: Use KVPR score difference to guide placement decisions

name: adaptive_strategy
description: Choose strategy based on input characteristics (size, count)

name: rebalance_worst
description: Greedy initial, then iteratively rebalance worst GPU

name: move_chain
description: Find chains of moves that improve overall KVPR

name: milp_relaxation
description: Solve relaxed LP, round to integer solution
